title: Electric vehicle (EV) driver behaviours and attitudes tracker
body: "This research draws from a representative sample of electric vehicle (EV) drivers in the UK to provide insights into:   driving patterns charging behaviours and experiences of home and public chargepoints barriers and enablers relating to EV usage levels of confidence and satisfaction with public chargepoint provision and making long-distance journeys in EVs    Data includes:    EV, battery electric vehicle (BEV) and plug-in hybrid electric vehicle (PHEV) tracker data for year 1 of the survey 2-week diary data for travel journeys and charges made by year 1 survey participants   Ipsos conducted this research on behalf of the Department for Transport.  "
